title: dombeya lucida subsp. megaphylla
intro: Dombeya lucida subsp. megaphylla is a plant species, commonly known as the large-leaved wild pear, belonging to the family Malvaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dombeya lucida subsp. megaphylla include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and preventing the growth of certain microorganisms. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to produce a tea, or by using the plant's extracts in topical applications.
